title: Push notification when an invoice has been paid
summaryBody: Could be useful for small biz re-enagement/relationship but annoying for larger biz (if they have way more invoices) so probably would require opt-in/out customisation
detailBody: Could be useful for small biz re-enagement/relationship but annoying for larger biz (if they have way more invoices) so probably would require opt-in/out customisation
